summary: Reviewed the freshly-rebuilt app core (upload.js, viewer.js, app.js, action-registry.js, index.html) and nginx vhost. Code is clean. Added non-breaking security headers to nginx; full resource CSP deferred until browser testing is restored.

findings.title: Full resource CSP (script-src/worker-src/img-src) not yet applied
findings.reason: Must be browser-verified before shipping; chrome-devtools tester is down (SYSTEM CRITICAL). Needs script-src 'wasm-unsafe-eval' for pdf.js WASM decoders. frame-ancestors CSP + clickjacking/privacy headers applied in the meantime.
findings.next_action: Apply full CSP once browser testing is restored, then confirm a real PDF still renders.

code_review.upload_validation: magic-bytes + MIME + .pdf extension + empty-check + 50MB limit + filename sanitize — OK

tls: none (HTTP-only; certbot deferred until cronloop.techtools.cz DNS cutover)
